user.title: Connect to NAD C368
user.description: Enter the IP address and port of your USR-TCP232-302 serial-to-Ethernet converter.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect. Check the IP address, port, and that the converter is powered on.

init.title: NAD C368 settings
init.description: Adjust connection, polling, the volume-to-dB mapping, and rename inputs. 0% = Minimum Volume, 100% = Maximum Volume.

send_command.name: Send command
send_command.description: Send any NAD C368 RS232 command as variable=value. Reaches every setting the amp exposes, even those without a dedicated entity.

command.name: Command
command.description: The variable to set, e.g. Source1.Enabled, Main.Brightness, Main.Source

value.name: Value
value.description: The value to set, e.g. No, Yes, 2, On, Off

query.name: Query value
query.description: Read any NAD C368 variable and return its current value.

command.name: Command
command.description: The variable to read, e.g. Main.Brightness, Source3.Name
